controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - voluntary amalgamation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Voluntary Amalgamation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - voluntary amalgamation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as a 'ucb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to all Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as a 'UCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as a 'ucb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
In this context, urban co-operative banks shall mean Primary Co-operative Banks
as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act,
1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure the entity which is to acquire the business of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Amalgamating Entity' means the entity which is to acquire the business
of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the entity which is to acquire the business of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory m
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
<image>
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by the RBI, or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory m

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover amalgamation of two or more ucbs
controls.control_description: These Directions shall cover amalgamation of two or more UCBs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover amalgamation of two or more ucbs

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider only those proposals where: (1) the amalgamating ucb assures to protect deposits of all the depositors of the amalgamated ucb irrespective of
controls.control_description:
RBI shall consider only those proposals where:
(1) the amalgamating UCB assures to protect deposits of all the depositors of
the amalgamated UCB irrespective of whether the net worth of the
amalgamated UCB is positive or negative, and in the latter case, whether
on its own or with financial support from the State Government extended
upfront as part of the process of the amalgamation, and
(2) the CRAR of the amalgamating UCB post-amalgamation conforms to the
minimum regulatory requirement as prescribed by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider only those proposals where: (1) the amalgamating ucb assures to protect deposits of all the depositors of the amalgamated ucb irrespective of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by two-third majority of the total number of board members (not merely of those present and voting) of both the amalgamating and the amalg
controls.control_description:
The decision of amalgamation shall be approved by two-third majority of the total
number of Board members (not merely of those present and voting) of both the
amalgamating and the amalgamated UCBs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by two-third majority of the total number of board members (not merely of those present and voting) of both the amalgamating and the amalg

controls.control_objective: To ensure give particular consideration to the following matters: (1) whether due diligence exercise has been undertaken in respect of the amalgamated entity
controls.control_description:
While giving approval, the Boards of the UCBs concerned shall give particular
consideration to the following matters:
(1) Whether due diligence exercise has been undertaken in respect of the
amalgamated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give particular consideration to the following matters: (1) whether due diligence exercise has been undertaken in respect of the amalgamated entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in conformity with the reserve bank guidelines / directives in this regard
controls.control_description:
(2) The changes which are proposed to be made in the composition of the Board
of Directors of the amalgamating UCB, consequent upon amalgamation, shall
be in conformity with the Reserve Bank guidelines / directives in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in conformity with the reserve bank guidelines / directives in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be in conformity with the relevant provisions of the cooperative societies act, as applicable, to the extent that they are not in conflict with t
controls.control_description:
Further, these changes shall also be in conformity with the relevant provisions
of the cooperative societies act, as applicable, to the extent that they are not
in conflict with the relevant RBI directions / guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be in conformity with the relevant provisions of the cooperative societies act, as applicable, to the extent that they are not in conflict with t

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in any revaluation upwards, or credit being taken for unrealised gains
controls.control_description:
(6) The assets, liabilities and reserves of the amalgamated UCB shall be
incorporated in the books of the amalgamating UCB at their existing carrying
amounts, and such incorporation shall not result in any revaluation upwards,
or credit being taken for unrealised gains.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in any revaluation upwards, or credit being taken for unrealised gains

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the shareholders of each ucb by a resolution passed by a majority representing two-thirds of the shareholders both in number and value
controls.control_description:
The draft scheme of amalgamation, having been approved separately by the
Boards of Directors of each of the UCBs under amalgamation, in accordance
with paragraph 8 and paragraph 9, shall be approved by the shareholders of
each UCB by a resolution passed by a majority representing two-thirds of the
shareholders both in number and value, present in person at a meeting called for
the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the shareholders of each ucb by a resolution passed by a majority representing two-thirds of the shareholders both in number and value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be published in newspapers at least once a week for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the locality or localities
controls.control_description:
The notices of every meeting of the shareholders called for approving the draft
scheme of amalgamation shall be published in newspapers at least once a week
for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the
locality or localities where the registered office of the UCB is situated, and one of
the newspapers shall be in a language commonly understood in the locality or
localities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be published in newspapers at least once a week for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the locality or localities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to rbi for sanction
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to the scheme of amalgamation being approved by the requisite
majority of shareholders as specified under paragraph 10 of these Directions, it
shall be submitted to RBI for sanction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to rbi for sanction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to rbi in accordance with annex, through the pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, information and documents shall be submitted to RBI in
accordance with Annex, through the PRAVAAH portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to rbi in accordance with annex, through the pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through an order in writing directing the date from which the properties / assets and liabilities of the amalgamated ucb will be transferred to and
controls.control_description:
Sanction of the scheme shall be through an order in writing directing the date
from which the properties / assets and liabilities of the amalgamated UCB will be
transferred to and vest in the amalgamating UCB and thereby, the amalgamated
UCB shall stand dissolved in terms of the provisions of Sub Section 6-A of
Section 44A of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (AACS).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through an order in writing directing the date from which the properties / assets and liabilities of the amalgamated ucb will be transferred to and

controls.control_objective: To ensure strike off the name of the society from its records in terms of the provisions of sub section 6-b of section 44a of the act ibid
controls.control_description:
A copy of the order directing such dissolution of the amalgamated UCB will be
transmitted by RBI to the Registrar of Cooperative Societies or the Central
Registrar, as applicable, under whose jurisdiction the amalgamated UCB is
registered as a Cooperative Society, and on receipt of such order, the Registrar
shall strike off the name of the Society from its records in terms of the provisions
of Sub Section 6-B of Section 44A of the Act ibid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strike off the name of the society from its records in terms of the provisions of sub section 6-b of section 44a of the act ibid

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be transmitted to the registrar of cooperative societies or the central registrar under whose jurisdiction the amalgamating ucb is registered
controls.control_description:
Additionally, a copy of the order
shall also be transmitted to the Registrar of Cooperative Societies or the Central
Registrar under whose jurisdiction the amalgamating UCB is registered, if the
amalgamated and amalgamating UCBs are governed under different
Cooperative Society Acts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be transmitted to the registrar of cooperative societies or the central registrar under whose jurisdiction the amalgamating ucb is registered

controls.control_objective: To ensure take effect only after the said registration with the issue of sanction order
controls.control_description:
In case, the amalgamating UCB is a uni-state bank and becomes multi-state
bank as a result of the amalgamation with a uni-state bank registered in another
State, a letter containing approval of the merger will be transmitted to the Central
Registrar for registration of the UCB as a multi-state UCB under the Multi-State
Co-operative Societies Act, 2002, and the amalgamation shall take effect only
after the said registration with the issue of sanction order.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take effect only after the said registration with the issue of sanction order

controls.control_objective: To ensure at its own discretion consider granting additional incentives as detailed below to an amalgamating ucb at the time of sanction of the scheme of amalga
controls.control_description:
Incentives to amalgamating UCBs: RBI may at its own discretion consider
granting additional incentives as detailed below to an amalgamating UCB at the
time of sanction of the scheme of amalgamation:
(1) The amalgamating UCB may be permitted to close down the loss incurring
branches (net loss for last three years) of the amalgamated UCB or merge
branches of the amalgamated UCB with its own.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at its own discretion consider granting additional incentives as detailed below to an amalgamating ucb at the time of sanction of the scheme of amalga

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to use closed / merged branch licenses for opening new branches in the expanded area of operation (i
controls.control_description:
The amalgamating UCB,
if need be, may be permitted to use closed / merged branch licenses for
opening new branches in the expanded area of operation (i.e., the area of
operations of the amalgamated and amalgamating UCB put together).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to use closed / merged branch licenses for opening new branches in the expanded area of operation (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure <image> be permitted within the expanded area of operation of the amalgamating ucb
controls.control_description:
Similarly, shifting / relocation of the branches of the amalgamated UCB may
<image>
be permitted within the expanded area of operation of the amalgamating
UCB, subject to the condition that the existing clientele is provided banking
facilities through the existing / relocated branches of the amalgamating /
amalgamated UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to <image> be permitted within the expanded area of operation of the amalgamating ucb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to retain the facilities such as ad category-i licence issued under fema, etc
controls.control_description:
(2) The amalgamating UCB may be permitted to retain the facilities such as AD
Category-I licence issued under FEMA, etc., where higher level of CRAR
at 12 percent is required on an on-going basis, provided it maintains the
benchmark CRAR of nine percent for a period as may be specified by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to retain the facilities such as ad category-i licence issued under fema, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be insisted upon in case the amalgamating ucb becomes multi-state ucb, only on account of the amalgamated ucb being registered in a different state
controls.control_description:
(3) The minimum entry point capital prescribed for multi-State UCBs may not
be insisted upon in case the amalgamating UCB becomes multi-State UCB,
only on account of the amalgamated UCB being registered in a different
State.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be insisted upon in case the amalgamating ucb becomes multi-state ucb, only on account of the amalgamated ucb being registered in a different state

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to amortise the loss taken over from the amalgamated ucb over a period of not more than five years, including the year of amalgamation
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to amortise the loss taken over from the amalgamated ucb over a period of not more than five years, including the year of amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as goodwill and amortized over a period of five years in equal installments
controls.control_description:
(i) Where the consideration, if any, paid for the acquisition / amalgamation
exceeds the book value of the net assets taken over, the excess amount
shall be treated as goodwill and amortized over a period of five years in
equal installments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as goodwill and amortized over a period of five years in equal installments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as goodwill and amortized over a period of five years in equal installments
controls.control_description:
(ii) Where no consideration is paid but the book value of the assets is less
than the book value of liabilities taken over, the excess of the book value
of liabilities over the book value of the assets taken over shall be
considered as goodwill and amortized over a period of five years in equal
installments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as goodwill and amortized over a period of five years in equal installments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as capital reserve
controls.control_description:
(iii) Where no consideration is paid, but the book value of the assets taken
over is greater than the book value of the liabilities taken over, the
excess of the book value of assets over the book value of the liabilities
shall be considered as Capital Reserve.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as capital reserve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final for all purposes
controls.control_description:
Such determination by the RBI of the value
of the shares shall be final for all purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final for all purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entitled to the refund of the value of shares only after full and final settlement of all dues to the ucb concerned
controls.control_description:
Provided that,
(1) if any shareholder of either of the UCBs (amalgamating or amalgamated
UCBs) who has subscribed to shares as linkage with borrowing has
outstanding dues in respect of credit facilities availed, such shareholder
shall be entitled to the refund of the value of shares only after full and final
settlement of all dues to the UCB concerned;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entitled to the refund of the value of shares only after full and final settlement of all dues to the ucb concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the details regarding the proposed treatment of shares held by shareholders of the amalgamated ucb and the rationale or detailed computations f
controls.control_description:
and
(2) both the amalgamated and amalgamating UCBs shall submit the details
regarding the proposed treatment of shares held by shareholders of the
amalgamated UCB and the rationale or detailed computations for
determination of the swap ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the details regarding the proposed treatment of shares held by shareholders of the amalgamated ucb and the rationale or detailed computations f

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effective
controls.control_description:
Operative date - The mutually agreed date on which amalgamation shall be
effective.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effective

controls.control_objective: To ensure be dealt with by the amalgamating ucb upon the scheme coming to effect
controls.control_description:
Legal Proceedings: Manner in which all the legal proceedings by or against the
amalgamated UCB shall be dealt with by the amalgamating UCB upon the
Scheme coming to effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be dealt with by the amalgamating ucb upon the scheme coming to effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure require
controls.control_description: Such other information and explanations as the RBI may require.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted
controls.control_description: The following financial information shall be submitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the below format: (1) appointment and purpose of ddr
controls.control_description:
The Due Diligence Report (DDR) of the amalgamated UCB shall be as per the
below format:
(1) Appointment and purpose of DDR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the below format: (1) appointment and purpose of ddr

controls.control_objective: To ensure require
controls.control_description: Such other information and documents as the RBI may require.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require
